title: volutaria lippii subsp. medians
intro: Volutaria lippii subsp. medians, also known as Volumina or Volumin, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent. The plant's leaves and stems have been known to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. In traditional herbal medicine, Volutaria lippii subsp. medians is often prepared as a decoction or infused in hot water to extract its medicinal properties and benefits.
